wafv2.rulegroup.labelsummary.CfnAbout:
List of labels used by one or more of the rules of a [AWS::WAFv2::RuleGroup](aws-resource-wafv2-rulegroup.md). This summary object is used for the following rule group lists: 
+  `AvailableLabels` - Labels that rules add to matching requests. These labels are defined in the `RuleLabels` for a rule. 
+  `ConsumedLabels` - Labels that rules match against. These labels are defined in a `LabelMatchStatement` specification, in the [Statement](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-wafv2-webacl-notstatement.html
